programme.desc: Tá balún Shailí i bhfostú sa chrann agus níl sí féin ná Nic in ann léim sách ard len é a fháil. (Nick and Sally can't jump high enough to get their balloon that is stuck in a tree.)

programme.title: Cat a' Hata
programme.desc: Tá Nic agus Sailí ag iarraidh pictiúr a tharraingt d'fhéileacán. (Nick and Sally are trying to draw a picture of a butterfly but can't get close enough to see it.)

programme.title: Cat a' Hata
programme.desc: Tá na gasúir ag péinteáil ach níl siad in ann cuimhneamh ar na dathanna ar fad atá sa tuar ceatha. (The kids are painting a picture of a rainbow.)

programme.title: Zak Jinks
programme.desc: Castar taibhse ar na páistí ar thuras campála ach cuireann Zak an ruaig air le draíocht. (The children encounter a ghost while on a camping trip.)

programme.title: Zak Jinks
programme.desc: Tá na páistí ag ceapadh go bhfuil an Mháistreás fuadaithe ag coimhthígh. (The children believe that an alien has abducted the teacher.)

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Beidh Melody ag tabhairt aghaidh ar an mBaile Beag le haghaidh ceolchoirme. (Melody is headed to Littleton for a big concert.)

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Is gearr go mbeidh Nic ina dhéagóir agus bíonn cumha air i ndiaidh a óige. (When Nic celebrates his last birthday as a child he becomes very nostalgic about his childhood.)

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Tá ainmhithe mara curtha trína chéile ag rás bád. (A boat race causes chaos and panic amongst the sea creatures.)

programme.title: Dar le Daideo
programme.desc: Insíonn Daideo scéal Dheirdre an toirtís a bhí ag iarraidh aithne a chur ar ainmhithe eile. (Daideo tells the story of a tortoise called Deirdre who wanted to make new friends.)

programme.title: GAA 2026
programme.desc: Buaicphointí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, cluichí ceannais shraitheanna Allianz san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA action including the Allianz League finals.)

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: An tseachtain seo tá na Underdogs ag tabhairt aghaidh ar thástálacha nirt agus aclaithe. (This week the Underdogs will undergo a grueling fitness test.)

programme.title: Croí an Chlub
programme.desc: Fillfidh bainisteoir Chumann Mícheál Breathnach, Cárthach, ar an mbaile den chéad uair le fada. (Manager Cárthach Bán Breathnach returns home for the first time in a while.)

programme.title: Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: Fágann milliúnaí an chuid is mó d'eastát ag a mhadra agus ní mó ná sásta atá a chlann faoi. (A millionaire dies and leaves most of his estate to a dog.)

programme.title: Na Saora Bád
programme.desc: Taispeánfaidh Michael Mac Donnacha as Conamara dúinn le curach adhmaid a dhéanamh. (This film follows Michael Mac Donnacha from Conamara as he constructs a wooden currach.)

programme.desc: Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Lidl Roinn 2. Á chur i láthair ag Máire Ní Bhraonáin. (Live coverage of the Lidl League Division 2 Final.)

programme.title: Domhan an Dúlra

programme.title: Ar Son na Cúise
